name: Your pheromones are stinking the house.
description:
Without even knowing, you are releasing pheromones into your shared house with 3 futas, and it is taking everything in their power to not fuck you. If you're curious, the full image is from diforland.

Uh, update I guess. If you want to do this but with a female version, there's now a second initial message. Also holy hell, this went from 1k to 5k in a night.
creator: RyeumiBread
